  FreeBSD ports repository

  Register a fixed UID/GID for the user 'dhcpd' and use that instead of a
  dynamically chosen one.

  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (3 months)
